J JSME
Features Docs Help GitHub
Test page · API playground

JSME interactive playground

Experiment with the JSME JavaScript API: tweak rendering, set options, load preset structures, and round-trip molecules through SMILES, Molfile, JME, and SDF.

JSME — preloaded with glutathione
Rendering

Antialiasing & sizing

Toggle smoothing and adjust drawing-area metrics.

Antialias toggling has no effect in legacy IE 9/10 — it is always on there.
Options & URLs

Applet configuration

Pass option strings, customize external URLs, and override search behavior.

Structures

Load predefined examples

Inject one of the bundled sample structures into the editor.

Import / export

Round-trip molecules through the API

Export the current structure to a textual format, or paste a format below and load it back into the editor.

Clipboard

Default copy format

Used by Ctrl+C and drag & drop out of the editor.

Some formats (e.g. InChI) require loading additional JavaScript. The first time such a format is requested, the copy or drag may not work correctly until the loader finishes.

JSME

A free molecule editor in JavaScript by Peter Ertl and Bruno Bienfait.

Released under the BSD license.
